associative_memories.notes: Semantic bridge and trace spike remain thin harness objects only.

content_addressed_records.notes: Stable record ids and integrity hashes reused instead of custom store.

exact_sidecar_handles.notes: Baseline B0/B1 use exact record or trace handles.

lsh_ann_routing.notes: Reuse existing random-hyperplane primitive only for carried fingerprint generation.

orthogonal_subspace_partitioning.notes: Minimal separated semantic/capsule blocks only; no new algebra.

provenance_dag_event_sourcing.notes: Typed exact sidecar payload + transactional write manifest.

sdm_style_activation.notes: Deferred; no custom SDM in this stage.

vsa_role_filler_records.notes: MAP operations from existing TorchHD stack.

why_not_scratch: Existing MAP/TorchHD operations already cover the semantic algebra.
Existing Stage A/A.1/A.2a exact scans, bit packing and LSH primitives already cover the routing substrate.
This seam only needs typed first-order glue, not a new provenance runtime or vector database.
